preview_text:
The model favors Portugal at 66%, a clear margin over Uzbekistan's 9% win probability. This reflects a substantial gap in the forecast, though the underdog retains a non-trivial chance of an upset.

The draw sits at 25%, a meaningful portion of the probability space. The model's distribution suggests a moderately competitive match rather than a heavily tilted affair; Uzbekistan's combined non-loss probability reaches 34%, indicating the match is unlikely to be one-sided despite Portugal's standing as favorite.

The market consensus diverges noticeably from the model. Sportsbooks push Portugal to 80%, some 14 percentage points higher, while compressing the draw to 14% and Uzbekistan's upset chance to 6%. Polymarket prices align closely with the sportsbook view. The dashboard does not adjudicate which assessment is more accurate; the difference may reflect market confidence, sharper information, or divergent modeling assumptions.
